question.label: Reset timing
question.name: Is now a good time for this conversation, or should we reschedule?
question.description: Direct reset to confirm whether to continue or stop a non-functional session.

assessment.note: Skip on a direct reset confirms the session is non-functional; no signal on wellbeing or clarity. [SESSION NON-FUNCTIONAL: 3+ consecutive non-answers. Queue cleared.]

new_queue.label: Sharper next step
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
